Home / Email Marketing & Newsletters / Mautic

Mautic — open source alternative

Open source marketing automation platform.

Strengths

  • Full marketing automation — campaigns, landing pages, scoring.
  • Large ecosystem.
  • Strong for B2B lead nurturing.

Weaknesses

  • Heavy self-host setup (PHP + queue + cron).
  • UI is complex and has a learning curve.
  • Smaller company behind — not as polished as Mailchimp.
License: GPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 4/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Mautic is used as an alternative to

HubSpot CRM

Marketing, sales, and service in one platform.

See all alternatives →

Mailchimp

Email marketing and automations.

See all alternatives →

Kit (ConvertKit)

Creator-focused newsletter platform.

See all alternatives →

SendGrid

Transactional email API for apps, now Twilio SendGrid.

See all alternatives →

Mailgun

Developer-focused transactional email and SMTP relay.

See all alternatives →
